content.en:
"Master of the Fire King!"

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors were very puzzled, they had never heard of any master of the Fire King, and the aura of the person who came was much stronger than that of the Fire King, and he was an invincible Dao Ancestor.

But what is the origin of this invincible Dao Ancestor? They have never heard of it.

"The last generation of Fire King, Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor!"

Peerless Dao Ancestor spoke.

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor was a little surprised, and said, "You know me?"

His reputation is not obvious, and his previous identity is the Fire King, and others call him the Fire King, so others only know the Fire King, but they don't know the name of his Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor.

"What, the last generation of Fire Lords?"

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors were shocked.

"Could it be that the legend is true, the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain is just a code name, this code name is a title that has been passed down from generation to generation, not specifically referring to a certain ten people!" The Ten Thousand Sword Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect was shocked.

The expressions of the other Supreme Dao Ancestors changed drastically one by one, if this guess was true, then the strength of Black Wind Mountain was far from being as simple as it was in front of them!

The ten kings represent the ten supreme Dao ancestors, although the domain realm was shattered in a battle, four of the ten kings fell, and only six kings remained, but if the ten kings of the previous generation and the previous generation were still alive, how many supreme Dao ancestors were there in Black Wind Mountain? How many invincible Dao ancestors were there?

"Of course I know you!" Wushuang Dao Ancestor said: "Although I don't know much about your Black Wind Mountain, I do know a few people, one of them is your Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, it is said that you once came to a secret realm of our Mitian Sect to steal, but was repelled by an invincible Dao Ancestor of our Mitian Sect!"

"There's such a thing, it's been a long time ago!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor sighed.

Immediately, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor glanced at the Fire King, and then looked at the Peerless Dao Ancestor and said, "Give me a face today, this matter is over, how about it?"

"Don't think about it, how can a forbidden treasure be just like that?"

The Peerless Dao Ancestor killed the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, and he was not afraid of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor at all.

"It looks like we still have to fight!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor muttered.

Bang!!!!

The two invincible Dao Ancestors of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor and the Peerless Dao Ancestor fought, while the other Supreme Dao Ancestors looked at the Fire King one after another.

Now that the Fire King is on the verge of death, this is a good time to kill him.

The Wind King's expression changed, and he hurriedly wanted to take the Fire King and escape, but there were too many Supreme Dao Ancestors around, almost dozens of them.

If you want to save the Fire King from so many supreme Dao Ancestors, the difficulty is enough to compare to the difficulty of killing the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

That's when it happened.

Several figures appeared, and voices came from them at the same time.

"Wind King, Fire King, we're here to help you!"

Rumble!!!!

The other four kings of the Black Wind Mountain are also here!

"King of Gold, King of Wood, King of Ice, King of Time!"

When the other Supreme Dao Ancestors saw these four Supreme Dao Ancestors, they still did not have the slightest fear.

They have dozens of Supreme Dao Ancestors, and Black Wind Mountain is only six Supreme Dao Ancestors this time, and only five Supreme Dao Ancestors are fighting at this time, so they can't threaten them at all.

However, just when many supreme Dao ancestors were about to attack and kill, another forbidden treasure appeared, and two appeared at once.

“......"

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors hesitated for a moment and quickly made a decision.

Woohoo!!!

A powerful Dao Ancestor shuttled away to snatch other forbidden treasures.

After all, although some Supreme Dao Ancestors are also eager to get the Forbidden Fire Lotus, the Forbidden Fire Lotus may not be suitable for them, and besides, so many Supreme Dao Ancestors are just trying to snatch a Forbidden Treasure, and there are two Invincible Dao Ancestors here, it is unlikely that the snatching will succeed.

Instead of this, it is better to snatch the forbidden treasure that has just appeared.

In the blink of an eye, most of the Supreme Dao Ancestors had fled, leaving only the three Supreme Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect and several other Supreme Dao Ancestors, and it was difficult for these Supreme Dao Ancestors to snatch the forbidden treasure on the Fire King's body when they combined.

That's it.

The five kings of Black Wind Mountain protected the Fire King and calmly retreated, and the forbidden fire lotus fell into the hands of Black Wind Mountain.

When the Six Kings of Black Wind Mountain came out of the forbidden land of Huoyan, the Fire King thanked him, "Thank you brothers for your help!"

"You still want to thank the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor!" Shi Wang said: "For you, the existence of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor has been exposed, which is not a good thing for us in Black Wind Mountain, and it has suddenly become the target of many big forces. In addition, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor told us that let's immediately evacuate the Huoyan Forbidden Land, don't get involved, even if there are precious treasures, don't go in!"

"Why?"

The Wind King asked.

He hasn't gained anything this time, and if he goes back to sleep like this, he will lose a lot!

He can be said to have been born twice, and the next time he is born, I'm afraid it will be a long, long time.

"I don't know!" Shi Wang shook his head, "But we must obey the orders of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor. I have a guess that it is estimated that the Invincible Dao Ancestors will descend on the Huoyan Forbidden Land in large numbers, and once this happens, we will fall if we are not careful. The Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor is also for our safety, and he doesn't want us to sacrifice him!"

"Hey, let's go back then!"

The Wind King said unwillingly.

The Wind King, the Fire King, the Time King, the Gold King, the Wood King, and the Ice King returned to the small realm one by one, and then entered the sleeping place, and began to continue to sleep, no longer paying attention to the things in the forbidden land of Huoyan, lest he couldn't help but run out again.

......

", forbidden treasure!"

Ye Tian was very surprised, he walked around casually, and he actually encountered a forbidden treasure.

Could it be that your luck is so good?

This time he entered the Huoyan Forbidden Land, he really didn't want to obtain the Forbidden Treasure, the purpose was just to obtain some more forbidden and strange things.

He knew very well that at this time, there were definitely many supreme Dao Ancestors who had entered the Huoyan Forbidden Land, and maybe there were invincible Dao Ancestors coming.

If he snatched the forbidden treasure, it would not be a good thing, and he didn't want to experience the picture of being besieged by the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

But......

"The Forbidden Treasure was sent to me, and there are no other True Ancestors nearby, if I don't take it, it will be too much!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian grabbed more than a dozen magma monsters and sent them to this forbidden treasure that resembled a stick pile one by one.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The Great Terror is triggered, and the magma monsters are wiped out by the Great Terror.

It took the death of the nine-headed magma monster for the great terror to completely dissipate.

It is conceivable how terrible the great terror caused by the forbidden treasure is, if Ye Tian faces this great terror, I am afraid that he will also fall and die.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian grabbed this forbidden treasure long stick and was about to leave here.

But at this time, a Supreme Dao Ancestor had already arrived.

This Supreme Dao Ancestor was the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, he sensed Ye Tian's existence, and immediately said angrily: "Nine Extremes Heavenly General, leave it for me!"

Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor was very angry, the Fire King of Black Wind Mountain had snatched the Forbidden Fire Lotus before, and he finally sensed the breath of another Forbidden Treasure, but he didn't expect it to be snatched away by the Nine Extremes Heavenly General of Black Wind Mountain.

"Damn, you Black Wind Mountain are too domineering!"

Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor said angrily.

He can't kill the Fire King of Black Wind Mountain, but he can't kill a True Ancestor.

He also knew that Ye Tian was the supreme true ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, and if he could kill Ye Tian, it would be comparable to killing a supreme Dao Ancestor, which was enough to make Black Wind Mountain's heart ache.

Rumble!!!

Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor slammed into the sky with a punch, ignoring the distance, and descended directly on Ye Tian's body.

"Great Wilderness Law Body!"

The middle thousand Dao technique of the extreme level violently defended against the punch of the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor, although it was still broken, but the passive defense Dao Technique Vajra battle body was not broken, and after the weakening of the forbidden body, the remaining impact could not hurt Ye Tian at all.

"What, the extreme level of the Vajra battle body, the extreme level of the Great Wilderness Law Body, and sixty percent of the forbidden body!"

Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor was shocked.

Ye Tian actually cultivated the Vajra Battle Body and the Great Wilderness Law Body to the extreme level in such a short period of time, and also increased the Forbidden Body to sixty percent, this speed is terrifying!

He also knows a little bit about the Supreme True Ancestor, but he can't be so demonic!

However, what he never expected was that Ye Tian had fused hundreds of Dao-level natal talents, plus there were seven Ancient Realm records to assist in cultivation, and the speed of cultivation did not know how much more than others.

Except for Ouyang Jiu'er, who was not as good as the reincarnation of the half-step domain ancestor, the progress speed of the other Supreme True Ancestors was also far inferior to him.

"Ten Thousand True Spears!"

Ye Tian's backhand is a blow.

Rumble!

The Ten Thousand Evil True Spear struck the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor Zhen and flew out, even shattering one of his hands, and a trace of blood flowed out.

Although the wound of the Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor recovered in an instant, there was no injury at all.

But the Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor's eyes widened, revealing an incredible look.

"Demon, you are still at the level of the True Ancestor, it is enough to be comparable to the ordinary Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, this is the Supreme True Ancestor!"

Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor muttered.
